## PepsiCo focuses on Frito-Lay turn-around plan

PepsiCo updated investors on its three-point turn-around plan for its North American Frito-Lay business, focused on refreshing product lines, investing in specific brands and categories to drive growth and broadening PepsiCo’s presence in social eating occasions, as shared in its full-year 2024 results.

raw_text:
[G2's 2024 Year in Review]: As Monty’s skillsets expand, he’s become not just a buyer’s assistant but also a customer support agent, sales prospecting expert, and a visionary in market intelligence. When it comes to Monty for Sales impact, we saw some impressive results, including:

 30% of buyers who engaged with Monty converted into a lead or opportunity.
 Prospects who chatted with Monty were 30x more likely to book a demo.
 One customer reported a 70x ROI increase through Monty-sourced pipeline and 100 hours of sales prospecting time saved monthly!

## Innovations that drive buyer-seller connections and revenue

Beyond Monty’s advancements, we launched several additional innovations to help bridge the gap between software buyer activity and business impact.

In 2024, we introduced: [...] ## Strengthening leadership and global impact

This year brought exciting new additions to our leadership team, including Sydney Sloan as Chief Marketing Officer. A seasoned marketing leader with decades of experience driving transformative growth for technology businesses, including Salesloft, Drata, Alfresco, and Adobe, she’s already made an immediate impact on our team.

Tim Sanders, who joined Sydney’s Marketing team as Vice President of Research Insights, is another notable new joiner in 2024. A best-selling author, Harvard fellow, and former Yahoo and Upwork executive, Tim is now driving G2’s market leadership in data-driven insights. [...] Localized Experiences: making G2.com available in Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese (with plans to expand to additional languages)—plus translated badges and review forms—so even more people can research and review software in their preferred language.
 Even more AI-powered features: enhancing every aspect of the buyer-seller journey with tools like sentiment analysis through Pros and Cons, Thought Provokers in our Review Form to guide comprehensive feedback, and an SEO tool to elevate seller G2 Profile descriptions.
 Security-conscious profile features: empowering vendors to add security assessment badges and feature their external cybersecurity ratings directly in their G2 Profiles.

[...] Looking ahead, PepsiCo has updated its financial guidance for the full year of 2024. The company now expects to achieve approximately 4% organic revenue growth, slightly down from its previous guidance of at least 4%.  
  
Despite this slight revision, the company remains confident in its ability to deliver at least 8% core constant currency EPS growth for the year. This guidance is underpinned by several strategic initiatives, including disciplined commercial investments and enhanced productivity measures aimed at driving growth.
